drafts.subject: Re: Provisional patent timing before June demo
drafts.body:
Hi Avery,

Thanks for the note. I can help you prepare for the provisional patent discussion, and the June 12 demo date is important context for our timing. Please send the design notes, photos, and control-flow diagram when ready. I will also send over an intake checklist and a few times for a call next week.

Best,
Jordan
